dataset.name: Naturalistic Neuroimaging Database (NNDb)
dataset.citation: Aliko, S., Huang, J., Gheorghiu, F., Meliss, S., & Skipper, J. I. (2020). A naturalistic neuroimaging database for understanding the brain using ecological stimuli. Scientific Data, 7(1), 347.

subject: sub-1
preprocessingNotes: Preprocessed by NNDb authors (AFNI; blurred + bandpass + ICA-censoring). Sampled to FreeSurfer pial vertices via nearest-voxel lookup in MNI N27 mm space. Z-scored per voxel, clipped to ±3σ, parcellated into 512 k-means clusters on cortex coordinates, mean per parcel, smoothed temporally (3-frame triangular).
